description_long: This is a medium-sized ceramic cup with a deep purple exterior and a bright green interior. The cup features a smoothly curved body that tapers slightly towards the base, providing a stable foundation. A large, angular handle is attached to one side, making it easy to grip and carry. The word 'coffee' is prominently displayed in a playful green font on the side of the cup, adding a touch of personality. The surface appears matte with a slight sheen, suggesting a glazed ceramic finish. The cup is open at the top, designed to hold hot beverages such as coffee or tea.
description: A purple ceramic cup with a green interior, large handle, and 'coffee' text on the side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle on the left and the 'coffee' text clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view with no handle or text visible, only the smooth purple surface and green rim.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the right, no text visible, showing the cup's full profile.
description_view_3: Back view with the handle barely visible and part of the 'coffee' text peeking from the right.
